final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial photo, travel magazine cover
Primary request: red convertible driving on Route 66 at sunset, evoking freedom and wanderlust
Scene/backdrop: American Southwest desert landscape, endless highway stretching to horizon, scattered saguaro cacti and tumbleweeds
Subject: vintage red convertible with top down, chrome details gleaming, driver silhouette visible
Style/medium: 35mm film photography, retro Americana aesthetic, Kodachrome color grading
Composition/framing: wide shot, low horizon line, car positioned in lower third moving toward vanishing point, 28mm wide-angle lens
Lighting/mood: golden hour sunset, warm orange-red sky gradients, long dramatic shadows, nostalgic and liberating atmosphere
Color palette: burnt orange sky + deep red convertible + dusty beige desert + sage green cacti + warm amber highlights
Materials/textures: weathered asphalt with cracks, dusty desert sand, glossy car paint with sun reflections, spiky cactus surfaces
Constraints: maintain the iconic Route 66 road sign visible in distance, keep warm sunset tones dominant
Avoid: oversaturated neon colors, modern cars, urban elements, flat lighting, artificial HDR look
